expo.name: URBANOVA
expo.description: URBANOVA is a shared micromobility client built with Expo and React Native.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: URBANOVA uses your location to show nearby vehicles and guide you through rides.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Location access lets URBANOVA keep your ride connected even when the app is in the background.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow URBANOVA to access your location to find nearby vehicles and unlock rides.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow URBANOVA to use your location while riding so we can pause or end rides automatically.
